title: T-022 — Greedy assignment algorithm in solver service
prompt:
# T-022 — Greedy assignment algorithm in solver service

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §6 D1, §10.1 finite_capacity_solver_v1, §7.1 FR-07-E1-002
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement greedy assignment algorithm in `services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/greedy.py`: sort WOs by weighted priority (deadline_days_until=0.4, allergen_complexity=0.3, customer_priority=0.2, line_affinity=0.1), iterate assigning each to earliest-feasible (line, shift, time_window) respecting capacity_kg_per_hour, shift_patterns, wo_dependencies (cascade DAG).

## Implementation contract
1. New module `services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/greedy.py` exporting `def greedy_assign(wos: list, lines: list, shifts: list, dependencies: list, matrix: dict) -> list[Assignment]`.
2. Sort WOs by weighted priority score using params from §10.1 finite_capacity_solver_v1.
3. For each WO in sort order: find earliest feasible slot respecting (line capacity_kg_per_hour, shift_patterns availability, wo_dependencies parent.planned_end_time <= child.planned_start_time, allergen line compatibility from input).
4. Output: list of dataclass Assignment(wo_id, line_id, shift_id, planned_start_time, planned_end_time, optimizer_score).

## Files
- services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/greedy.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/__init__.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/tests/test_greedy.py [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 5 WOs + 2 lines, when greedy_assign runs, then all 5 WOs assigned (no unassigned in fixture) with planned_start_time non-decreasing per line
2. Given a WO with parent dependency in input, when greedy_assign runs, then child WO planned_start_time >= parent WO planned_end_time (V-SCHED-03)
3. Given line capacity 100 kg/h and 3 WOs requiring 80kg each in shift A (8h=800kg), when greedy_assign runs, then all fit within shift; if requirement totals exceed 800kg, surplus moves to next shift

## Test strategy
- RED: write services/planner-solver/tests/test_greedy.py asserting cascade DAG respect + capacity respect + sort order
- Run 'cd services/planner-solver && uv run pytest tests/test_greedy.py'

## Risk red lines
- Do not violate cascade DAG (V-SCHED-03 hard constraint)
- Do not exceed capacity_kg_per_hour per shift (V-SCHED-04 hard constraint)
- Do not place WO on line with incompatible allergen (V-SCHED-02 hard constraint)
